TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Maw-ce-tunśĮõśĺ§śĚĪ == Maw-ce-tun yu mahid nikaudip śĮõśĺ§śĚĪśó©ŚĻīÁĒüś∂Į caywal siwlu mihcaan caytu bulad tunem demiad, licuhen ci Maw-ce-tun i Hu-na-sen sing-tan-sin' Saw-san-cun. namaka enem a mihcaan, mipupuc tu tu lutuk ci Maw-ce-tun, pakan tu katalan, mikilim tu tayi, mikasuy, nikatinengan tu sulitan malingatu tu miedap misulit. caysiw lunem mihcaan Maw-ce-tun milecad tu ci Ay-de-cia.Se-nuo tu wama ci Maw-sun-se tu nikadan nu sakaudip mahida u "siidaay nu malukay". caysiw lusiw mihcaan caytu bulad tuwal dimiad, Maw-ce-min itida i Su-len-muo-se-ke kuncen kanatal nipiyukiw, milaydi tu kaka ci Maw-ce-tun misuli tu lilipaw, ci Maw-sun-sen "lusep mihcaan nikudan, paluma mikawaw henay tu malukay nu niyadu'an pacakay tu tuud. sipakayda i Cun-kuo nakamuan, sadikuday nu tuluay a mihcaan u siidaay nu malukay". 1893ŚĻī12śúą26śó•, ." mapatideng tu Cun-hua-zin-min-kun-he-kuo, ci Maw-ce-tun kinapina atu calekakaan nida ci Maw-ce-len musakamu tu wama ci Maw-sun-sen pasayda ci Maw-ce-len wamanida ci Maw-cu-sen micakay tu sakaudip nu pitu a kubuan nu umahan, u udip tu ku madatengay, nanai' ku balucu' i malekakaay, hicahicaen musakamu kaisa mitengil. simsim satu kaku, caay kaw nu luma' acacay kina kawaw, pasusiakay tu a kawawan, tada madateng tu ahican ku nipisumad tu siakay, kya caay ka lahat kinakawaw, sisa paytem satu kaku mikilim tu ahican miedap ku pakuyucay nu malukay a dadana." ." caysiw caycay mihcaan tu palaludan, tayda ci Maw-ce-tun i Cen-sa, tayda i Sin'-sin micudad, sayaway makaadih tu Cun-kuo-tun-mun-hun "min-li-paw", matineng tu Sun-cun-san atu Cun-kuo-tun-mun-hun, ci Hun-sin itida i Kun-cuo mililid tu mihantayay nu hitay atu Hun-hua-kan nu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a kawawan, malingatu miedap ci Sun-cun-san ke-min-dan. masekin ni Maw-ce-tun ku Sin'-sin a cacudadan, i cacudadan paduhepit ci nida tu sapibelinaw tu Cin-caw, patideng tu min-kuo, patahekal patideng ci Sun-cun-san mala tabakiay nu Cun-tun, ci Kan-yu-wi malacon-li, ci Ling-ci-caw malasakay hekal nu tahudan, patideng musakamu tu sapipusudaw tu tanayuay nu bukesan. 1911ŚĻīśė•, . lima bulad, labuay nu kanatal malingatu mibelin tu sihu pacakay tu dadan nu silamalay, ci Maw-ce-tun atu kaput nu heni milabu tina kawawan, ci Maw-ce-tun atu kaput nida maluayaw mipusut tu bukenida, pacicien nida ku pina nu cacay a bataan nu tademawan mipusut tu bukes. 5śúą, . Wen-hua ta-ke-min atu nika balaki a nikaudip śĖáŚĆĖŚ§ßťĚ©ŚĎĹŚŹäśôöŚĻī caysiw piccay mihcaan siwa a bulad, paytem ku masakaputay ni Lin-peaw, amipatay ci Maw-ce-tunang i nipikatacuwacuwaan, palekal tu nikalepacaw, siwa bulad pitu demiad ci lan-li-kuo pasayda i "Len-he-cin-duy" mihapu tu "yi-ci-cen-pei, siwa bulad walu demiad misulit ci Lin-peaw tu sapihapu tu " duducen ku kawaw, hidan u nakamuan nu maku mikawaw". ci Maw-ce-tun makatengil besut sa namaka Hng-cuo pasayda i San-hay, siwa a bulad caytu dimiad makatukuh i Pei-cin, taluma' i Cun-hay pahanhan. ci Cuo-en mihapu miwawah tu la-ta miadih tu tapukuwan, kya matineng tu nikaydaan nu hikuki, nikadan ci Cuo-en mihapuac tu sakaytapukuwan a kawawan, deben namin ku pahikukian, pasaluimengen namin ku hikuki, ci kalamkam ci Maw-ce-tun tayni pakatineng a ci Cuo-en naicuwa matineng tu nipilaliw ni Lin-pewan, itini ci Cuo-en miwanan milimad taydan i zen-min-ta-hun timula nu caycaywal a dabekan. 1971ŚĻī9śúą, 118Śģ§. Ni-ke'-sen, midis ci Lin, midis ci Kug atu midis ci Ten caysiw piccay mihcaan lim bulad tusiw demiad, mihang ci Maw-ce-tun ci Cuo-en-lay, tawya nu dimiad cunhun pasayda ci Ni-ke'-sen patahekal tu "kumuan", manamuh tu nikatayni ni Ci-sin-ci, mihimicu tu sasakamuen. putu bulad caynem demiad, Cuo Mea tusa a kanatalan malecad ku nipihapuan, mihapu tu nika tayni ni Ni-ke'-sen, caysep bulad tunem demiad, tusa nu kanatalan pulung masasudang malaheci kina kawawan. caysep bulad tulim demiad, Lein-he-kuo tahun malakuuy ku nikasasuwalan, pabelih tu Cun-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo itida i lein-he-kuo hamin nu kinlian, tawya a demiad ci Maw-ce-tun miawda ci Cuo-en-lay atu sakayhekalan nu tademaw mikaygisa, paytem patideng tu Cun-kuo dayhiw sapikaygi tu Lein-ta. caysiw picnem mihcaan siw bulad wal demiad, mahetik ku idang ni Maw-ce-tun, salabi sa ku tahuda mididaw ci Maw-ce-tun ngan, siw bulat siw demiad teban nu labii tu caysep nu tukian, matulin tu sepat a tukian milawlaw tu balucu', tepek satu ku balucu ni Maw-ce-tun. 1976ŚĻī9śúą8śó•, . amica yu maudip henay ci Maw-ce-tun saan anu mapatay kaku tuduhen kaku sa, katepekan ni Maw-ce-tun tawya a demiad paytem a hidan tu ku kidu nida tahadauc sa. .
S.PHON: == maw- ¶…ô-tun*** == maw- ¶…ô-tun ju mańßid nikaudip ******* ¶ajwar~…ĺ siwr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…ĺad tun…ôm d…ômiad, r~…ĺi ¶uńß…ôn ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun i ńßu-na-s…ôn siŇč-tan-sin Ē~ ° saw-san- ¶un. namaka …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶aan, mipupu ¶ tu tu r~…ĺutuk ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun, pakan tu katar~…ĺan, mikir~…ĺim tu taji, mikasuj, nikatin…ôŇčan tu sur~…ĺitan mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mi…ôdap misur~…ĺit. ¶ajsiw r~…ĺun…ôm mińß ¶aan maw- ¶…ô-tun mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia.s…ô-nuo tu wama ¶i maw-sun-s…ô tu nikadan nu sakaudip mańßida u "siidaaj nu mar~…ĺukaj". ¶ajsiw r~…ĺusiw mińß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…ĺad tuwar~…ĺ dimiad, maw- ¶…ô-min itida i su-r~…ĺ…ôn-muo-s…ô-k…ô kun ¶…ôn kanatar~…ĺ nipijukiw, mir~…ĺajdi tu kaka ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun misur~…ĺi tu r~…ĺir~…ĺipaw, ¶i maw-sun-s…ôn "r~…ĺus…ôp mińß ¶aan nikudan, par~…ĺuma mikawaw ńß…ônaj tu mar~…ĺukaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an pa ¶akaj tu tuud. sipakajda i ¶un-kuo nakamuan, sadikudaj nu tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan u siidaaj nu mar~…ĺukaj". ***********, ." mapatid…ôŇč tu ¶un-ńßua-zin-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun kinapina atu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nida ¶i maw- ¶…ô-r~…ĺ…ôn musakamu tu wama ¶i maw-sun-s…ôn pasajda ¶i maw- ¶…ô-r~…ĺ…ôn wamanida ¶i maw- ¶u-s…ôn mi ¶akaj tu sakaudip nu pitu a kubuan nu umańßan, u udip tu ku madat…ôŇčaj, nanai Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i mar~…ĺ…ôkakaaj, ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a…ôn musakamu kaisa mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ. simsim satu kaku, ¶aaj kaw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶aj kina kawaw, pasusiakaj tu a kawawan, tada madat…ôŇč tu ańßi ¶an ku nipisumad tu siakaj, kja ¶aaj ka r~…ĺańßat kinakawaw, sisa pajt…ôm satu kaku mikir~…ĺim tu ańßi ¶an mi…ôdap ku pakuju ¶aj nu mar~…ĺukaj a dadana." ." ¶ajsiw ¶aj ¶aj mińß ¶aan tu par~…ĺar~…ĺudan, tajda ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun i ¶…ôn-sa, tajda i sin Ē~ °-sin mi ¶udad, sajawaj makaadińß tu ¶un-kuo-tun-mun-ńßun "min-r~…ĺi-paw", matin…ôŇč tu sun- ¶un-san atu ¶un-kuo-tun-mun-ńßun, ¶i ńßun-sin itida i kun- ¶uo mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu mińßantajaj nu ńßitaj atu ńßun-ńßua-kan nu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a kawawan, mar~…ĺiŇčatu mi…ôdap ¶i sun- ¶un-san k…ô-min-dan. mas…ôkin ni maw- ¶…ô-tun ku sin Ē~ °-sin a ¶a ¶udadan, i ¶a ¶udadan paduńß…ôpit ¶i nida tu sapib…ôr~…ĺinaw tu ¶in- ¶aw, patid…ôŇč tu min-kuo, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ patid…ôŇč ¶i sun- ¶un-san mar~…ĺa tabakiaj nu ¶un-tun, ¶i kan-ju-wi mar~…ĺa ¶on-r~…ĺi, ¶i r~…ĺiŇč- ¶i- ¶aw mar~…ĺasakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tańßudan, patid…ôŇč musakamu tu sapipusudaw tu tanajuaj nu buk…ôsan. ******, . r~…ĺima bur~…ĺad, r~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu mib…ôr~…ĺin tu sińßu pa ¶akaj tu dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun atu kaput nu ńß…ôni mir~…ĺabu tina kawawan, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun atu kaput nida mar~…ĺuajaw mipusut tu buk…ônida, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn nida ku pina nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu tad…ômawan mipusut tu buk…ôs. **, . w…ôn-ńßua ta-k…ô-min atu nika bar~…ĺaki a nikaudip ******** ¶ajsiw pi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan siwa a bur~…ĺad, pajt…ôm ku masakaputaj ni r~…ĺin-p…ôaw, amipataj ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tunaŇč i nipikata ¶uwa ¶uwaan, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, siwa bur~…ĺad pitu d…ômiad ¶i r~…ĺan-r~…ĺi-kuo pasajda i "r~…ĺ…ôn-ńß…ô- ¶in-duj" mińßapu tu "ji- ¶i- ¶…ôn-p…ôi, siwa bur~…ĺad war~…ĺu d…ômiad misur~…ĺit ¶i r~…ĺin-p…ôaw tu sapińßapu tu " dudu ¶…ôn ku kawaw, ńßidan u nakamuan nu maku mikawaw". ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ b…ôsut sa namaka ńßŇč- ¶uo pasajda i san-ńßaj, siwa a bur~…ĺad ¶ajtu dimiad makatukuńß i p…ôi- ¶in, tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i ¶un-ńßaj pańßanńßan. ¶i ¶uo-…ôn mińßapu miwawańß tu r~…ĺa-ta miadińß tu tapukuwan, kja matin…ôŇč tu nikajdaan nu ńßikuki, nikadan ¶i ¶uo-…ôn mińßapua ¶ tu sakajtapukuwan a kawawan, d…ôb…ôn namin ku pańßikukian, pasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč…ôn namin ku ńßikuki, ¶i kar~…ĺamkam ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun tajni pakatin…ôŇč a ¶i ¶uo-…ôn nai ¶uwa matin…ôŇč tu nipir~…ĺar~…ĺiw ni r~…ĺin-p…ôwan, itini ¶i ¶uo-…ôn miwanan mir~…ĺimad tajdan i z…ôn-min-ta-ńßun timur~…ĺa nu ¶aj ¶ajwar~…ĺ a dab…ôkan. *******, ****. ni-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ôn, midis ¶i r~…ĺin, midis ¶i kug atu midis ¶i t…ôn ¶ajsiw pi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan r~…ĺim bur~…ĺad tusiw d…ômiad, mińßaŇč ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun ¶i ¶uo-…ôn-r~…ĺaj, tawja nu dimiad ¶unńßun pasajda ¶i ni-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ôn patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu "kumuan", manamuńß tu nikatajni ni ¶i-sin- ¶i, mińßimi ¶u tu sasakamu…ôn. putu bur~…ĺad ¶ajn…ôm d…ômiad, ¶uo m…ôa tusa a kanatar~…ĺan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nipińßapuan, mińßapu tu nika tajni ni ni-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ôn, ¶ajs…ôp bur~…ĺad tun…ôm d…ômiad, tusa nu kanatar~…ĺan pur~…ĺuŇč masasudaŇč mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i kina kawawan. ¶ajs…ôp bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺim d…ômiad, r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo tańßun mar~…ĺakuuj ku nikasasuwar~…ĺan, pab…ôr~…ĺińß tu ¶un-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo itida i r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo ńßamin nu kinr~…ĺian, tawja a d…ômiad ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun miawda ¶i ¶uo-…ôn-r~…ĺaj atu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan nu tad…ômaw mikajgisa, pajt…ôm patid…ôŇč tu ¶un-kuo dajńßiw sapikajgi tu r~…ĺ…ôin-ta. ¶ajsiw pi ¶n…ôm mińß ¶aan siw bur~…ĺad war~…ĺ d…ômiad, mańß…ôtik ku idaŇč ni maw- ¶…ô-tun, sar~…ĺabi sa ku tańßuda mididaw ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun Ňčan, siw bur~…ĺat siw d…ômiad t…ôban nu r~…ĺabii tu ¶ajs…ôp nu tukian, matur~…ĺin tu s…ôpat a tukian mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, t…ôp…ôk satu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u ni maw- ¶…ô-tun. *********, . ami ¶a ju maudip ńß…ônaj ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun saan anu mapataj kaku tuduńß…ôn kaku sa, kat…ôp…ôkan ni maw- ¶…ô-tun tawja a d…ômiad pajt…ôm a ńßidan tu ku kidu nida tańßadau ¶ sa. .
S.FORM: == Maw-ce-tunśĮõśĺ§śĚĪ == Maw-ce-tun yu mahid nikaudip śĮõśĺ§śĚĪśó©ŚĻīÁĒüś∂Į caywal siwlu mihcaan caytu bulad tunem demiad, licuhen ci Maw-ce-tun i Hu-na-sen sing-tan-sin' Saw-san-cun. namaka enem a mihcaan, mipupuc tu tu lutuk ci Maw-ce-tun, pakan tu katalan, mikilim tu tayi, mikasuy, nikatinengan tu sulitan malingatu tu miedap misulit. caysiw lunem mihcaan Maw-ce-tun milecad tu ci Ay-de-cia.Se-nuo tu wama ci Maw-sun-se tu nikadan nu sakaudip mahida u "siidaay nu malukay". caysiw lusiw mihcaan caytu bulad tuwal dimiad, Maw-ce-min itida i Su-len-muo-se-ke kuncen kanatal nipiyukiw, milaydi tu kaka ci Maw-ce-tun misuli tu lilipaw, ci Maw-sun-sen "lusep mihcaan nikudan, paluma mikawaw henay tu malukay nu niyadu'an pacakay tu tuud. sipakayda i Cun-kuo nakamuan, sadikuday nu tuluay a mihcaan u siidaay nu malukay". 1893ŚĻī12śúą26śó•, ." mapatideng tu Cun-hua-zin-min-kun-he-kuo, ci Maw-ce-tun kinapina atu calekakaan nida ci Maw-ce-len musakamu tu wama ci Maw-sun-sen pasayda ci Maw-ce-len wamanida ci Maw-cu-sen micakay tu sakaudip nu pitu a kubuan nu umahan, u udip tu ku madatengay, nanai' ku balucu' i malekakaay, hicahicaen musakamu kaisa mitengil. simsim satu kaku, caay kaw nu luma' acacay kina kawaw, pasusiakay tu a kawawan, tada madateng tu ahican ku nipisumad tu siakay, kya caay ka lahat kinakawaw, sisa paytem satu kaku mikilim tu ahican miedap ku pakuyucay nu malukay a dadana." ." caysiw caycay mihcaan tu palaludan, tayda ci Maw-ce-tun i Cen-sa, tayda i Sin'-sin micudad, sayaway makaadih tu Cun-kuo-tun-mun-hun "min-li-paw", matineng tu Sun-cun-san atu Cun-kuo-tun-mun-hun, ci Hun-sin itida i Kun-cuo mililid tu mihantayay nu hitay atu Hun-hua-kan nu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a kawawan, malingatu miedap ci Sun-cun-san ke-min-dan. masekin ni Maw-ce-tun ku Sin'-sin a cacudadan, i cacudadan paduhepit ci nida tu sapibelinaw tu Cin-caw, patideng tu min-kuo, patahekal patideng ci Sun-cun-san mala tabakiay nu Cun-tun, ci Kan-yu-wi malacon-li, ci Ling-ci-caw malasakay hekal nu tahudan, patideng musakamu tu sapipusudaw tu tanayuay nu bukesan. 1911ŚĻīśė•, . lima bulad, labuay nu kanatal malingatu mibelin tu sihu pacakay tu dadan nu silamalay, ci Maw-ce-tun atu kaput nu heni milabu tina kawawan, ci Maw-ce-tun atu kaput nida maluayaw mipusut tu bukenida, pacicien nida ku pina nu cacay a bataan nu tademawan mipusut tu bukes. 5śúą, . Wen-hua ta-ke-min atu nika balaki a nikaudip śĖáŚĆĖŚ§ßťĚ©ŚĎĹŚŹäśôöŚĻī caysiw piccay mihcaan siwa a bulad, paytem ku masakaputay ni Lin-peaw, amipatay ci Maw-ce-tunang i nipikatacuwacuwaan, palekal tu nikalepacaw, siwa bulad pitu demiad ci lan-li-kuo pasayda i "Len-he-cin-duy" mihapu tu "yi-ci-cen-pei, siwa bulad walu demiad misulit ci Lin-peaw tu sapihapu tu " duducen ku kawaw, hidan u nakamuan nu maku mikawaw". ci Maw-ce-tun makatengil besut sa namaka Hng-cuo pasayda i San-hay, siwa a bulad caytu dimiad makatukuh i Pei-cin, taluma' i Cun-hay pahanhan. ci Cuo-en mihapu miwawah tu la-ta miadih tu tapukuwan, kya matineng tu nikaydaan nu hikuki, nikadan ci Cuo-en mihapuac tu sakaytapukuwan a kawawan, deben namin ku pahikukian, pasaluimengen namin ku hikuki, ci kalamkam ci Maw-ce-tun tayni pakatineng a ci Cuo-en naicuwa matineng tu nipilaliw ni Lin-pewan, itini ci Cuo-en miwanan milimad taydan i zen-min-ta-hun timula nu caycaywal a dabekan. 1971ŚĻī9śúą, 118Śģ§. Ni-ke'-sen, midis ci Lin, midis ci Kug atu midis ci Ten caysiw piccay mihcaan lim bulad tusiw demiad, mihang ci Maw-ce-tun ci Cuo-en-lay, tawya nu dimiad cunhun pasayda ci Ni-ke'-sen patahekal tu "kumuan", manamuh tu nikatayni ni Ci-sin-ci, mihimicu tu sasakamuen. putu bulad caynem demiad, Cuo Mea tusa a kanatalan malecad ku nipihapuan, mihapu tu nika tayni ni Ni-ke'-sen, caysep bulad tunem demiad, tusa nu kanatalan pulung masasudang malaheci kina kawawan. caysep bulad tulim demiad, Lein-he-kuo tahun malakuuy ku nikasasuwalan, pabelih tu Cun-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo itida i lein-he-kuo hamin nu kinlian, tawya a demiad ci Maw-ce-tun miawda ci Cuo-en-lay atu sakayhekalan nu tademaw mikaygisa, paytem patideng tu Cun-kuo dayhiw sapikaygi tu Lein-ta. caysiw picnem mihcaan siw bulad wal demiad, mahetik ku idang ni Maw-ce-tun, salabi sa ku tahuda mididaw ci Maw-ce-tun ngan, siw bulat siw demiad teban nu labii tu caysep nu tukian, matulin tu sepat a tukian milawlaw tu balucu', tepek satu ku balucu ni Maw-ce-tun. 1976ŚĻī9śúą8śó•, . amica yu maudip henay ci Maw-ce-tun saan anu mapatay kaku tuduhen kaku sa, katepekan ni Maw-ce-tun tawya a demiad paytem a hidan tu ku kidu nida tahadauc sa. .
S.PHON: == maw- ¶…ô-tun*** == maw- ¶…ô-tun ju mańßid nikaudip ******* ¶ajwar~…ĺ siwr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…ĺad tun…ôm d…ômiad, r~…ĺi ¶uńß…ôn ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun i ńßu-na-s…ôn siŇč-tan-sin Ē~ ° saw-san- ¶un. namaka …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶aan, mipupu ¶ tu tu r~…ĺutuk ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun, pakan tu katar~…ĺan, mikir~…ĺim tu taji, mikasuj, nikatin…ôŇčan tu sur~…ĺitan mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mi…ôdap misur~…ĺit. ¶ajsiw r~…ĺun…ôm mińß ¶aan maw- ¶…ô-tun mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶i aj-d…ô- ¶ia.s…ô-nuo tu wama ¶i maw-sun-s…ô tu nikadan nu sakaudip mańßida u "siidaaj nu mar~…ĺukaj". ¶ajsiw r~…ĺusiw mińß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…ĺad tuwar~…ĺ dimiad, maw- ¶…ô-min itida i su-r~…ĺ…ôn-muo-s…ô-k…ô kun ¶…ôn kanatar~…ĺ nipijukiw, mir~…ĺajdi tu kaka ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun misur~…ĺi tu r~…ĺir~…ĺipaw, ¶i maw-sun-s…ôn "r~…ĺus…ôp mińß ¶aan nikudan, par~…ĺuma mikawaw ńß…ônaj tu mar~…ĺukaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an pa ¶akaj tu tuud. sipakajda i ¶un-kuo nakamuan, sadikudaj nu tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan u siidaaj nu mar~…ĺukaj". ***********, ." mapatid…ôŇč tu ¶un-ńßua-zin-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun kinapina atu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nida ¶i maw- ¶…ô-r~…ĺ…ôn musakamu tu wama ¶i maw-sun-s…ôn pasajda ¶i maw- ¶…ô-r~…ĺ…ôn wamanida ¶i maw- ¶u-s…ôn mi ¶akaj tu sakaudip nu pitu a kubuan nu umańßan, u udip tu ku madat…ôŇčaj, nanai Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° i mar~…ĺ…ôkakaaj, ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a…ôn musakamu kaisa mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ. simsim satu kaku, ¶aaj kaw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶aj kina kawaw, pasusiakaj tu a kawawan, tada madat…ôŇč tu ańßi ¶an ku nipisumad tu siakaj, kja ¶aaj ka r~…ĺańßat kinakawaw, sisa pajt…ôm satu kaku mikir~…ĺim tu ańßi ¶an mi…ôdap ku pakuju ¶aj nu mar~…ĺukaj a dadana." ." ¶ajsiw ¶aj ¶aj mińß ¶aan tu par~…ĺar~…ĺudan, tajda ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun i ¶…ôn-sa, tajda i sin Ē~ °-sin mi ¶udad, sajawaj makaadińß tu ¶un-kuo-tun-mun-ńßun "min-r~…ĺi-paw", r~…ĺima bur~…ĺad, r~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu mib…ôr~…ĺin tu sińßu pa ¶akaj tu dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun atu kaput nu ńß…ôni mir~…ĺabu tina kawawan, ¶i maw- ¶…ô-tun atu kaput
